betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ground Trap & Water Trap§f

§aPassively generate animal products and fish without killing mobs.§f

The §bGround Trap§f and §bWater Trap§f are automated bait-based resource generators. Place them in the correct environment, add bait, and they passively produce animal drops or fish over time — no hunting required.

§6Ground Trap§f:
§b• Environment§f: Must be placed with at least §e5 dirt or grass blocks§f within a §e2-block radius§f.
§b• Bait Types§f: Grain Bait, Fruit Bait, or Veggie Bait (placed in the top slot).
§b• Output§f: Random animal products — raw beef, chicken, pork, mutton, turkey, duck, rabbit, plus leather, feathers, eggs, and bones.
§b• Base Cycle§f: §e3,500 ticks§f (≈§e2.9 minutes§f), reduced §e5%§f per adjacent dirt/grass block.

§6Ground Trap Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f
§b• 4× Sticks§f
§b• 1× Trapdoor§f
§b• 3× String§f
§b• 1× Chest§f

§6Water Trap§f:
§b• Environment§f: Must be placed with at least §e5 water source blocks§f within a §e2-block radius§f.
§b• Bait Type§f: Fish Trap Bait (placed in the top slot).
§b• Output§f: Random fish — vanilla Cod, Salmon, Pufferfish, Clownfish, plus HarvestCraft species (Anchovy, Bass, Carp, Catfish, Char, Clam, Crab, Crayfish, Eel, Frog, Grouper, Herring, and many more).
§b• Base Cycle§f: §e3,500 ticks§f (≈§e2.9 minutes§f), reduced §e5%§f per adjacent water block.

§6Water Trap Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f
§b• 4× Sticks§f
§b• 1× Fishing Rod§f
§b• 3× String§f
§b• 1× Chest§f

§6Bait Production§f:
§b• Grain Bait§f: Produced by the §bPresser§f from various grain items.
§b• Fruit Bait§f: Produced by the §bPresser§f from fruits and juices.
§b• Veggie Bait§f: Produced by the §bPresser§f from vegetables and seaweed.
§b• Fish Trap Bait§f: Crafted separately or obtained from the §bMarket§f.

§6Automation§f:
Both traps have §e19 inventory slots§f (18 output + 1 bait slot). Items can be piped in from the top and extracted from the bottom using §bhoppers§f, §bitemducts§f, or §bdrawers§f. The traps drop their inventory when broken.

§eTip§f: Set up a row of Ground Traps near a crop farm and a row of Water Traps in an ocean for passive meat and fish income. Feed the fish into a §bGrinder§f for §bGround Fish§f used in many meal recipes.
